audit_rule: A tested-policy null, restricted branch oracle, non-governing metric, or incomplete schedule family is not a family-wide quantitative ceiling.

lanes.strongest_existing_evidence: 192 five-dimensional constants; regime-wise maximum minus best constant 0.0041566
lanes.ceiling_failure: Restricted maximum is a PI lower bound; the learner had 52 continuous sequential decisions and no componentwise resource envelope.
lanes.smallest_valid_repair: Freeze Op3 orders, Op9 orders, shift-hours and buffer/ROP commitments, then certify a 52-stage finite-grid transducer/DP or a continuous global bound.

lanes.strongest_existing_evidence: Optimized constant beats canonical PPO by 0.00001805 with wholly negative CI
lanes.ceiling_failure: Retires one learner claim only; static search was Sobol plus local refinement against 104 continuous weekly decisions and lacked a complete resource vector.
lanes.smallest_valid_repair: Freeze all quantity, dispatch, shift-hour, inventory and capacity commitments, then certify a 104-stage global bound or a finite-grid transducer with discretization error.

lanes.strongest_existing_evidence: Six-rule one-day branch oracle over 600 sampled states, mean 0.0010945
lanes.ceiling_failure: One-day return-to-SPT branches do not bound 728 daily service choices or arbitrary queue service.
lanes.smallest_valid_repair: Solve an arbitrary-order-service PI relaxation by MILP or min-cost flow under visible-v1 and lost/service constraints.

lanes.strongest_existing_evidence: Restricted 14-day oracle 0.02212 and Program-E PPO delta -0.0000506
lanes.ceiling_failure: The 987 sequences are not the 56-day frontier, the learner loss is a policy null, and departures/vehicle-hours differ.
lanes.smallest_valid_repair: Exact or certified 56-stage HOLD/DISPATCH transducer with Pareto frontiers over departures and unavailable vehicle-hours.

lanes.strongest_existing_evidence: Four-week immediate token branches with restricted PI up to 0.022584; one depth-3 tree passes 0/24 cells
lanes.ceiling_failure: Local branches and one tree do not bound 32 weekly token decisions.
lanes.smallest_valid_repair: Build a 32-stage token-allocation transducer and, if PI remains material, a belief-MDP or information-relaxation bound.

lanes.ceiling_failure: The endpoint is not governing visible-v1; even on its own endpoint the bound exceeds 0.01 and tested belief policies do not bound the optimum.
lanes.smallest_valid_repair: Replay all 81 sequences through compute_order_level_ret_excel_visible_ledger, then solve the four-stage observation-history/belief tree if PI remains material.

lanes.ceiling_failure: Wrong endpoint and incomplete calendars: the central screen uses 1,041 periodic schedules, not all 3^8.
lanes.smallest_valid_repair: Enumerate all 6,561 eight-week schedules per tape and frozen cell under visible-v1 with complete crew and guardrail ledgers.

lanes.strongest_existing_evidence: Static, base-stock, MPC and myopic clairvoyant comparisons on cost J
lanes.ceiling_failure: J is not canonical ReT, the greedy clairvoyant is not an upper bound, and total ordering resource is not fixed.
lanes.smallest_valid_repair: Port outcomes to canonical OrderRecords, freeze order/dispatch budget and solve a finite-horizon resource-constrained DP with a certified continuous-action bound.

lanes.strongest_existing_evidence: Exact full-ledger H_PI=H_obs=0 plus an explicit visible-v1 counterexample
lanes.ceiling_failure: The dominance theorem is deliberately invalid for sparse visible-v1 because later batching can outscore earlier completion.
lanes.smallest_valid_repair: Vectorize all 5,758,374 non-superior-budget schedules on burned tapes using the visible aggregator and preserve exact ties and guardrails.

lanes.strongest_existing_evidence: Three route doctrines and one signal heuristic; positive cells have nonpositive LCB and extra departures
lanes.ceiling_failure: The clairvoyant is myopic and can be negative; comparators, trajectory audit and resources are incomplete; route physics is unvalidated.
lanes.smallest_valid_repair: After Garrido route/fleet validation, build a 56-day HOLD/R1/R2 transducer with departure, vehicle-hour and payload Pareto frontiers.

current_disposition: Historical diagnostic only. Visible-v1 is globally quarantined; no lane may be repaired or promoted by completing a visible-v1 ceiling.
recommended_order: Program J request-snapshot-v2 108-cell resource-only PI screen
M/T/R v2 key-v5/global-bound redesign after Program J
Do not replay Program H's action-dead adapter
Other families only after their registered domain/action/resource gates
claim_limit: This audit identifies missing ceilings and metric/comparator defects. It is not evidence that any lane is positive, and it is not a terminal boundary certificate.
